items.title: The Jackass Sticker Capsule
items.body: Today we’re excited to release the Jackass Sticker Capsule in association with Paramount Games Studio, Jackass graphic artist Andy Jenkins, and community artist The Danidem. Celebrating the release of jackass: best and last, the Jackass Sticker Capsule contains 39 stickers referencing iconic Jackass moments. Whether it’s an airhorn on a golf course or a trip down Electric Avenue, there’s something for every jackass in here; even you!

items.title: Team Falcons' Finale
items.body: on the toughest Playoff bracket in Major history, the Falcons made a triumphant statement at the IEM Cologne 2026 Major. Facing the defending Major Champions in the Quarterfinals, Falcons defeated Vitality 2-1, with each map taking 24 rounds to determine a winner. The Semifinals weren't any easier, where the Falcons met Team Spirit in a best of three that saw two maps go to Overtime. In the end, the Falcons outlasted Team Spirit 16: 12 on Dust II, taking the series 2-1 and booking their first appearance in the Grand Finals. In the Grand Finals the Falcons left no doubt, defeating FURIA 3-0 to claim the organization's first Major Championship. To celebrate the closing of the Cologne Major,

items.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
items.body: Champions Autograph Stickers are now available for purchase in the Major Shop, congratulations to the Falcons! Highlight Souvenir Charms are now available for purchase in the Major Shop, featuring 10 highlights for each of the six stages of the Cologne 2026 Major, and the Falcons' trophy-lifting moment

items.title: The IEM Cologne 2026 Grand Finals
items.body: Following one of the most unforgettable days in Major playoff history, Saturday's Semifinals left two teams standing in pursuit of a Major Championship. After losing the opening map of their Playoffs, FURIA have been unbeaten, rallying back against 9z Team to win 2-1 in the Quarterfinals and taking down Aurora Gaming 2-0 in the Semifinals to reach the Grand Finals for the first time in the organization's history. Team Falcons took down the world's #1 team, Team Vitality, 2-1 in the Quarterfinals. A day later, they punched their ticket to the Grand Finals by defeating Team Spirit 2-1 in dramatic fashion, needing Overtime in the third map. This is Team Falcons first Major Championship

items.title: Playoffs at the "Cathedral of Counter-Strike"
items.body: Playoffs at the IEM Cologne 2026 Major begin tomorrow and the "Cathedral of Counter-Strike" awaits. For the second consecutive Major, FURIA and Team Spirit finished Stage III with perfect 3-0 records. Aurora, Falcons, and Vitality finished 3-1, and 9z Team, Bet Boom, and G2 Esports advanced with 3-2 records. The Lanxess Arena will host the Playoffs, beginning with Thursday's Quarterfinals matchups: 9z Team vs. FURIA Aurora vs. Bet Boom The second set of Quarterfinals takes place Friday, featuring: G2 Esports vs. Team Spirit Falcons vs. Vitality With Semifinals on Saturday and the Grand Finals on Sunday, we're in for a great weekend of Counter-Strike.
